name: Miryam Lipper
subject: Friend, Jon will make health care a top priority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
He's focusing on accessibility and affordability |
---
Friend,

The public health crisis we are in underscores the importance of having good health care.

**Jon Ossoff wants to make health care accessible and affordable for everyone. He will fight to:**
* ✅ Crack down on price gouging by drug and insurance companies

* ✅ Ensure every Georgian is covered by high-quality insurance regardless of wealth

* ✅ Improve access to health care services across the state

* ✅ Expand the personal choice and control Georgians have over their own care

**[Will you pitch in $20 right now to help elect a Senator who will make health care access a top priority?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e24e0/5b2c1286/3faa01b1/25f009a6/3633725890/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_26_health_plan?refcode=em_2020_08_26_health_plan&amount=20")**

| | [DONATE NOW](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e24e0/5b2c1286/3faa01b1/25f009a6/3633725890/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_26_health_plan?refcode=em_2020_08_26_health_plan&amount=20")
---

**Friend, this couldn't come at a more crucial time. This year --_in the middle of a global pandemic_ \-- millions of Americans have lost their health care.**

_And yet, Jon's opponent David Perdue continues to support Donald Trump's efforts to gut the Affordable Care Act,_ jeopardizing health care for another nearly 500,000 Georgians, including women, young people, and folks with pre-existing conditions.

**_There's no way around it: This is just cruel._**

Jon wants to root out the corruption that keeps drug prices high. He will serve the people -- not insurance companies or special interests.

**We need Jon in the Senate to be a leader on this, friend. Countries around the world have managed to develop robust, accessible, affordable health care systems, and I know we can, too.**

**[Georgia deserves a Senator who will serve his constituents, instead of his bank account. Chip in $20 right now to send Jon Ossoff to the Senate to fight for you and me.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e24e0/5b2c1286/3faa01b1/25f009a6/3633725890/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_26_health_plan?refcode=em_2020_08_26_health_plan&amount=20")**

name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: Joshua Scott for Congress Has MOMENTUM
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gLaH5IdztIfBCP.&b=_mEp1kLw1ryjxUINnHfbIw

Peter

I am so excited to tell you about the incredible amount of support our campaign has been receiving. The momentum is certainly building, and we are proud to share some of the awesome stuff that we have been up to that has everybody in the East San Gabriel Valley talking about our movement.

This past weekend may have been the the best one yet. On Saturday in San Dimas, we helped put together the largest freedom rally in Southern California, right in the heart of District 32. Hundreds of patriotic and diverse Americans came to voice their support for our campaign, our President, our brave law enforcement officers, and of course, FREEDOM. Not to mention, many were there to voice their disdain for the tyrannical "policies" coming from the California state government. On Sunday, I was honored to speak at Calvary Road Baptist Church in Monrovia. This congregation, like many others, has been through a lot in 2020, and I was proud to tell them that when I am elected, their rights to practice their religion and attend church on Sundays will NEVER be infringed on again. Here are some photos of this amazing weekend:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gLaH5IdztIfBCP.&b=TAzM5ndpJa0jWjYrVMkRRA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gLaH5IdztIfBCP.&b=TAzM5ndpJa0jWjYrVMkRRA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gLaH5IdztIfBCP.&b=TAzM5ndpJa0jWjYrVMkRRA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gLaH5IdztIfBCP.&b=TAzM5ndpJa0jWjYrVMkRRA

We have definitely sent some shockwaves throughout the district, and I am so excited to keep working hard with my amazing team and supporters through November 3. Remember, we had the top-performing Republican congressional campaign in Los Angeles County in the primary election, so watch out for District 32 during this quest to take back California!

Thank you for your support during this journey.

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gLaH5IdztIfBCP.&b=_mEp1kLw1ryjxUINnHfbIw

info@votejoshuascott.org

(626) 214-5406

P.S. Please respond to this email if you would like a yard sign!

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Before Pence's speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Tonight, Vice President Mike Pence will address the Republican National Convention. |
---

Peter,

Tonight, Vice President Mike Pence will address the Republican National Convention. I'm going to tell you why his speech will be wrong about our country, and wrong about our future -- but first, [I need to ask you to chip in $25 to help Joe Biden and me win this election, and stop the damage that the Trump-Pence administration is doing to our nation.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B4_kdh-pence_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B4_kdh-pence_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

**Donald Trump and Mike Pence can talk all they want about making America great again, but they can't hide from their record. Look at where they've brought us:**

American families are reeling from the worst public health crisis in a century, and the worst economic crisis since the Great Depression. Trump and Pence have responded with incompetence.

Our nation is experiencing a moral reckoning with racism and systemic injustice, which has sent people of all ages, colors, and creeds to the streets to demand change. Trump and Pence have responded with callousness.

America is grieving, and Trump and Pence have tried to turn our tragedies into political weapons. They think it will help them win re-election, but they're wrong. Because we know the truth: We can do so much better, and we deserve so much more.

**We need a president who can bring us together, and who is ready to lead in this time of crisis. We need to elect Joe Biden.**

[If you've had enough of Trump and Pence's failure to lead, and if you're ready for something better, then I urge you to chip in $25 to support Joe's and my campaign if you're able. Every dollar you give will help fund our path to victory in November >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B4_kdh-pence_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B4_kdh-pence_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

What Joe Biden understands -- and Trump and Pence never will -- is that this campaign isn't about him, or about me. It's about you. It's about us. It's about what kind of nation we want to be, and what kind of future we're going to leave behind to our children and grandchildren.

So tonight, Peter, I hope you can tune out all the noise coming from the Republican Convention, and focus on what you're going to do to help answer those questions over the next 69 days.

I know one thing for sure: I'm glad to have you with us in this fight.

**And I look forward to debating Mike Pence on the debate stage.**

[https://go.joebiden.com/beat-trump-fund](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B4_kdh-pence_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B4_kdh-pence_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Sincerely,

Kamala

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b01f/1cd0ac28/1509005f1/357f4bc5/3459360916/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b01f/1cd0ac28/1509005f1/357f4bc2/3459360916/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b01f/1cd0ac28/1509005f1/357f4bc1/3459360916/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b01f/1cd0ac28/1509005f1/357f4bc4/3459360916/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b01f/1cd0ac28/1509005f1/357f4bc0/3459360916/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b01f/1cd0ac28/1509005f1/357f4bc3/3459360916/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b01f/1cd0ac28/1509005f1/357f4bbf/3459360916/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

I'm going to tell you why his speech will be wrong about our country, and wrong about our future -- but first, "" Donald Trump and Mike Pence can talk all they want about making America great again, but they can't hide from their record. Look at where they've brought us: American families are reeling from the worst public health crisis in a century, and the worst economic crisis since the Great Depression. Trump and Pence have responded with incompetence. Our nation is experiencing a moral reckoning with racism and systemic injustice, which has sent people of all ages, colors, and creeds to the streets to demand change. Trump and Pence have responded with callousness. America is grieving, and Trump and Pence have tried to turn our tragedies into political weapons. They think it will help them win re-election, but they're wrong. Because we know the truth: We can do so much better, and we deserve so much more. We need a president who can bring us together, and who is ready to lead in this time of crisis. We need to elect Joe Biden. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" What Joe Biden understands -- and Trump and Pence never will -- is that this campaign isn't about him, or about me. It's about you. It's about us. It's about what kind of nation we want to be, and what kind of future we're going to leave behind to our children and grandchildren. So tonight, Peter, I hope you can tune out all the noise coming from the Republican Convention, and focus on what you're going to do to help answer those questions over the next 69 days. I know one thing for sure: I'm glad to have you with us in this fight. And I look forward to debating Mike Pence on the debate stage. "" Sincerely, Kamala | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: Congressional Representation for the Central Coast
body:
Some Money is Necessary - My Opponent has Lots - there is much to do | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
### Dear Voter in District 20,

I am running for U.S. Congress to represent you, bringing focus on safety, small government, family values and low taxes.

WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT

I stand for:

> Safe neighborhoods, trusting in our wonderful police and monitoring their protocols where needed

> Clean affordable water for residents of the Central Coast

> Strengthen K-12 education by school choice, and emphasis on the three Rs as opposed to dilution of class time with gender and ethnic studies

> Stand up to China to protect our intellectual property and safety of key supply chains for pharmaceuticals, rare earth metals etc.

> Reduce taxes. My opponent is with a "progressive" platform that would raise federal taxes by at least $2000 per median family.

> Keep our energy supply robust. We need a spectrum of sources. Dems want only solar and wind, for which the grid has only 18 seconds of storage if these are the chief sources

> Reduction of burdensome regulations on small businesses and individuals

> Strong support for religious freedom and for the right to bear arms

Your support of $17.76 or $100 or $500 OR EVEN**$1,776** will enable us to defeat our far left opponent, and serve our wonderful Central Coast community.

Thanking you in advance,
Jeff Gorman

Mail to
Jeff Gorman for Congress
312 W Franklin St, Ste 312
Monterey, CA 93940
or online: [www.JeffForCongress.com](https://jeffforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1587f4d77ba38f556383778ca&id=9495726f42&e=8bbf7a777a)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Blog Update 08/26/20
body:
It was the best of times, it was the worst of times No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Tale of Two Conventions](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrats finished their national convention last week and the Republican national convention just finished its second night. One convention featured speaker after speaker portraying America as a failed nation full of misery, poverty and angst. Meanwhile, the other convention celebrated everything that makes America the greatest country on earth and focused on the potential that our country can achieve in the future. In this week's blog I discuss both conventions and tell you which I'd rather attend! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [So is Kamala Harris Really a Moderate?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-d/)
The mainstream press has their marching orders and have shifted into full gear trying to paint Biden's Vice-Presidential pick, Kamala Harris, as a moderate. In this week's blog, we examine Harris' record, and what we find will unequivocally answer the question - is Kamala Harris really a moderate? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Biden Picks Kamala. The Unconventions. And Biden Makes Another Racist Comment.](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-u/)
Last night, the Biden campaign confirmed he is choosing Senator Kamala Harris to be his running mate. To many this was no surprise. However, what is surprising is just a few months ago, in the Democratic debate, Harris confronted Biden about having worked with segregationists in the Senate and discussed her personal history with busing. In this week's blog I discuss Biden's selection, the upcoming national conventions for both parties and yet another racially insensitive comment from basement Joe! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Will They or Won't They Debate? ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-n/)
The mainstream press is at it again, highlighting polls that favor Joe Biden and practically declaring Biden the winner of the upcoming presidential election. Many Trump supporters believe that the great equalizer will be face-to-face debates, however, many in the media are already casting doubt on these already scheduled debates. In this week's blog, I discuss if these debates will actually happen and I have a follow-up from last week's blog about what happens if the Democrats win the trifecta of the House, Senate and Presidency. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jkkuttdt-961825B2-kujkulhluu-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jkkuttdt-kujkulhluu-w/)

name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: Post Office in Peril: USPS Crisis is an Election Scam?
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=131A190A20A1351)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red, White & True... Post Office in Peril: USPS Crisis is an Election Scam?
---
| | In this week's episode of the [Red, White, and True podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=131A190A20A1363), Catherine takes a closer look at the Democrats' engineered chaos around the Post Office, and breaks down the important difference between vote by mail and voting absentee.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=131A190A20A1363)
---
| | Despite Democrats' massive push for a mail-in election, the Postal Service recently warned us all that it cannot guarantee all ballots cast by mail for the November election will arrive in time to be counted, even if mailed by state deadlines. That means the Democrats' actions could disenfranchise millions of American voters.
Make a plan to vote in person. It's the best way to ensure your vote counts. And share that information with your friends and family.

Click below to listen or [watch a video of the podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=131A190A20A1363) on our YouTube page.

name: Terry Neese
subject: Thank You
body:
Dear Friend,We came up short last night, but I am incredibly humbled by the outpouring of support I have received from Oklahomans across the district since I launched my campaign sixteen months ago.Now is the time for Republicans to focus on the real fight ahead of us: beating Kendra Horn and doing whatever it takes to re-elect President Trump in November.

Thanks to God for making this experience possible, my family for standing by my side every step of the way, and every single Oklahoman who put their trust and confidence in me.

God bless you all. [Unsubscribe](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-u-pujjudk-elutjhyju-r/)
---

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: An incredible story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, It was an honor to help this hero from the Greatest Generation obtain his official certificate of citizenship.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=270A448A1A5892)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

Last week a 95-year-old WWII veteran [wrote a letter](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=270A448A1A5890) to the editor on how Congressman Max Rose and his office did not assist him after he sought help to get his certificate of citizenship.

In fact, after receiving the run around, the WWII veteran only received one return email from Max Rose’s office. “We’ll look into it.”
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=270A448A1A5890)
---
| | |
---
| | After I saw Isidore Bertone’s letter to the editor, I connected with his family, called the White House and the U.S. Citizenship & Immigration Services and with four days (this past Tuesday) Isidore Bertone was [formally sworn-in](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=270A448A1A5891) at his home in Staten Island as a citizen of the United States after waiting 80 years.

It was an honor to have witnessed the swearing-in of an American hero.

Too many Americans don’t appreciate that they are citizens of the greatest nation in the world. For this 95 year old WWII veteran, it was the only thing he wanted.

---
| | |
---

It was an honor to have witnessed the swearing-in of an American hero. Too many Americans don’t appreciate that they are citizens of the greatest nation in the world. For this 95 year old WWII veteran, it was the only thing he wanted. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | It was an honor to help this hero from the Greatest Generation obtain his official certificate of citizenship. body:
With less than 10 weeks until Election Day, here’s what folks are saying about our campaign.

|
---

| | Josh is in this race for all the right reasons, friends. Josh is running to be a representative for the 6th District, not another politician, because he knows that folks in Washington are out of touch with folks back home. **That’s why we are so grateful to our supporters. You’re the reason we’ve been able to get Josh’s message out, the reason we got up on TV first, and the reason folks in the 6th District are hearing what Josh has to say. Team Hicks

**At the start of this campaign,** we set out to build a grassroots, people-focused campaign that we could be proud of. Our team’s goal has always been to bring real leadership and solutions to the working people of Kentucky’s 6th District.
**We started out far behind in fundraising, facing an opponent with powerful corporate backers and a big head start.** But, thanks to folks like you chipping in whatever you could, we were able to close the fundraising gap between Josh and his opponent last quarter.
And we did it without taking a dime from dark money donors. **To put it simply: grassroots supporters like you are the difference in this race.**
When Josh is elected to Congress, there will be no question who he’s working for, because our campaign is fueled by YOU. With just 10 weeks left until the election, every day, every dollar, and every donor matters in our effort to flip this seat.
**Now** , we’re charging full steam ahead towards Election Day. Our TV and digital ads are live — and we were up on air nearly _a week_ before our opponent. We were able to define ourselves before the attack ads came pouring in.
[_**Next, we need to raise $15,000 from grassroots donors before midnight on Monday. Can we count you on to chip in, and continue to be the difference in this race?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18869726/242449223/1882163059?refcode=FL_em_fr_20200827EOM2_TH_all_xx_xx_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzRkMzJkYy03MWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eX4Bks6AJ-Yq2xU8wbfH_vxqre5tCiK0H9WW8zW3lG0=)

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

As a state party, it’s easy to get lost in the email shuffle. With all of the fundraising emails going out for candidates we know that it can be easy to just scroll through.
But today we are asking you not to. Our efforts work in conjunction with Democratic candidates throughout the entire state, not to mention the presidential. It’s paramount that we have the funds to push our GOTV program and make sure that Democratic voters in West Virginia are informed and ready.
We still have $6,200 to raise if we’re going to meet our August goal – and it’s critical that we do. Can you help us out? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Thank you!
Team WVDP

name: Mary Mancini
subject: flipping seats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
The election is 67 days away and here’s the deal.
In 2018 Tennessee Democratic voter turnout increased in all 95 counties - in some places as much as 25%. With the right investment and messaging strategy we know we can flip seats in November. Targeted media will help mobilize Democrats to vote, vote early, and vote safely - but we need help covering costs.
We’ve already started assembling an amazing team to help us Get Out The Vote and support our diverse and talented roster of candidates. Now we need to focus on voter turnout. Targeted messaging and media are more critical than ever because of COVID-19. The GOP thinks that they have Tennessee on lock but we’re going to prove them wrong.
Will you make a donation right now, and help us pay for the media strategy needed to flip these crucial seats? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,

--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: This is what enthusiasm looks like
body:
Peter,
Wow. This is what enthusiasm looks like -- and it couldn’t come at a better time.
Last week, Governor Huckabee shared the big news that every donation to My Faith Votes in August would be matched 5X thanks to an extremely generous supporter
Well, nearly 1,200 donations later we’ve just crossed $90,000. Apply the match, and that’s an incredible $540,000 in one week.
[**_But that still leaves us short of our August goal of $1,000,000 -- so I’m asking for your urgent help to get us across that line before the month is over._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200827apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200827apl01nd&n=1)
I came aboard My Faith Votes because of their track record in 2016 and their courage to strive for big goals. One of those goals is 1 million new Christian voters in 10 swing states.
My job is to speak the truth about the issues facing Christians and rev up the troops.

Remember, your gift in August will have 5X the impact. Even just $35 adds up to $175 in August.

[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200827apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200827apl01nd&n=3)

name: Rita Hart [personal]
subject: help me prepare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | I want to thank you for being on my side since the beginning, Peter. But I need you on my team now more than ever. National polls are still calling this race a complete toss-up, and with my opponent getting support from dark money super PACs, I need your help to keep up. **[Can you donate whatever you can right now so I can reach voters before our district is flooded with D.C. money?](https://act.myngp.com/el/c0nWsQAtzd9EGrjvHv2Ah5-l1kjAg_gNAWjD3T5VML8=/hVuHzW_GK4HrERSsKBDaP2saEicYoE3TmfndrToBA-I=?refcode=200827-email)** I'm trying to raise as much as I can before the beginning of September so my team and I know exactly where we stand and what we can afford as we head into the final nine weeks of the election. **[Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can? Even if you donate just $5 today, if we all do our part, we'll have enough to reach every voter in the district in no time.](https://act.myngp.com/el/c0nWsQAtzd9EGrjvHv2Ah5-l1kjAg_gNAWjD3T5VML8=/hVuHzW_GK4HrERSsKBDaP2saEicYoE3TmfndrToBA-I=?refcode=200827-email&amount=5)** Nine weeks left in the election means that every single day is an opportunity to make a connection with someone in our community -- but we can't have those conversations without a dedicated team and volunteers with all the resources they need. **[So, can you help me prepare for a busy September of voter outreach and field work by donating whatever you can right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/c0nWsQAtzd9EGrjvHv2Ah5-l1kjAg_gNAWjD3T5VML8=/hVuHzW_GK4HrERSsKBDaP2saEicYoE3TmfndrToBA-I=?refcode=200827-email)** I appreciate all you do, Rita Hart [](https://act.myngp.com/el/c0nWsQAtzd9EGrjvHv2Ah5-l1kjAg_gNAWjD3T5VML8=/DWDFvhTCpeVcL0pvLuHsvGtkvnha5zEDUCL2Bd6HWPc=?refcode=200827-email) | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa

subject: 8,263 reasons to donate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:

| |
#
8,263. That is how many voters who voted in the 2016 Republican Primary switched parties and voted in the Democratic Primary in the Illinois 16th this March. 8,263 is the **critical** number of voters we must reach in this campaign if we are going to succeed. These voters are the very definition of swing voters, and the Republican Party knows this - that is why they are blanketing the airwaves in support of my opponent. [Click here to chip in and help spread our message.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=20fddca81a&e=140a9b81e7) **Adam Kinzinger knows that this race is competitive, and he is getting nervous.** And to make things worse, he has hundreds of thousands of dollars being pumped into his campaign by Wall Street, fossil fuel corporations, and other special interest groups. **I’m not worried, though**. I know that I can count on you to contribute to my campaign. This has always been a grassroots movement, powered by the people. After all, that is who I will fight for once I am elected to Congress – the people. I know I can win this race, but I need your help to reach these 8,263 critical swing voters. [Contribute today so that we can win this fall.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=def4f07d5f&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

body:
In just a few hours I will be taking the stage at the Republican National Convention. | | Have you seen the recent polling, Peter? We know Sen. Cornyn has. After seeing that MJ is _just one point_ from taking the lead, Sen. Cornyn launched an ad to try to win back voters. But whether he's successful depends on you. | **KEEP OUR DIGITAL ADS ONLINE

name: Bill Olson
subject: CNN Attacked an Innocent Student
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I am the new Republican nominee, running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

The President has been telling us for years and years about the disgusting injustice of the media. They exist to tear the American people down, to promote their far-Left agenda.

I truly believe many of them are evil people.

But none of their antics are worse than what they did to Nick Sandmann, the Covington Catholic student (a high school kid).

The media, especially CNN and the Washington Post, immediately attacked this kid. They incited violence; death threats to him and his family forced the family to go into hiding and the school to close temporarily.

In a word, these grown adults were trying to destroy this kid- to cancel him. This is what the far-Left media does.

They lie, they destroy, they incite, and they do everything they ever can to avoid telling the truth.

But they had never yet met the indomitable Nick Sandmann!

Like a pro, Nick and his lawyers savaged CNN, the Washington Post, and two dozen other Fake News media outlets. While the exact amounts due to Sandmann are unknown, it is telling that Wikipedia now refers to Nick as the "owner of CNN"!

I was in tears when I saw Sandmann speak at the Republican National Convention this week.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

Nick Sandmann, an 18-year-old graduate from Covington Catholic High School who was at the center of a nationwide viral video controversy, lambasted "cancel culture" in his speech to the Republican National Convention, calling on the country to join President Trump in calling the media out.

"I wouldn’t be canceled. I fought back hard to expose the media for what they did to me and won a personal victory. While much more must be done, I look forward to the day that the media returns to providing balanced, responsible and accountable news coverage," he said. "I know President Trump hopes for that too."

He continued: "In November, I believe this country must unite around a president who calls the media out and refuses to allow them to create a narrative instead of reporting the facts. I believe we must join with a president who will challenge the media to return to objective journalism."

Nick is now a freshman in college. And while he will be CNN's highest paid employee for many years, it took guts to come and speak out about our unethical attack dog media.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

The media are dedicated to the complete destruction of America, and they are equally devoted to the destruction of every single American who loves freedom and loves our country!

Here's the good news: The American people see the media for what it is!

A new poll released on Tuesday shows Americans have a growing distrust of the media, with an overwhelming majority saying the press have a political bias and nearly half saying news outlets display a "great deal" of bias.

The poll noted an increase in the percentage of Americans who see too much bias in ostensibly objective reporting as a "major problem." According to the poll, 73 percent of Americans share that belief, up from 65 percent in 2017.

Meanwhile, a stunning 84 percent of Americans agree that "the media is to blame for political division in this country," though the same percentage also believe the media "can serve as a healing force."

Nearly nine out of ten Americans agree with Nick Sandmann about the faults of the media. But they only win if we let them! That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

I'm an unapologetic patriot, unlike Joe Biden. Darren Soto sure as heck is not- he votes with Pelosi 93% of the time! He's a puppet of the extreme Left.

This very week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". Knowing the history that led up to World War II, this should send chills down the spines of all Americans.

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I don't have crazy Pelosi's money, which is why I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

I am calling all Trump patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg
This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg
today? I have a goal of $50,000 raised by the end of August to get on the air asap. Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcr6QcP5IF6OuRU&b=shhDlQt7u2._yBwf2iI7gg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

Have you seen the news? [](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=9b63bf21e6&e=e25784ff28) Meteorologists are currently watching Hurricane Laura, as it made landfall near the Texas-Louisiana border last night, registering as a Category 4 storm. While folks in the region aren’t unfamiliar with storms like this, this extreme weather highlights a much bigger issue: **climate change.**

Here’s the gist: **Scientists have found mounting evidence that human activity is raising the risk of some types of extreme weather -- including storms like Laura.**

Dana is running for Congress because Rep. Barry Loudermilk is ignoring science. Extreme weather events -- like hurricanes in the Gulf Coast or wildfires in California -- are real events that affect the lives and livelihoods of Americans across the country, and it’s time we do something about it.

[**Will you add your name right now to stand with Dana for common sense climate solutions? We need the federal government to do its part to fight against climate change, while ensuring that American jobs and paychecks are protected.** ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=1165f4907a&e=e25784ff28) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME ⇨](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=2452fc3af4&e=e25784ff28)**

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Did you Watch the RNC?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm also a delegate to the Republican National Convention, so I wanted to give you an update of what I'm seeing!**

I'm proud that our state is hosting the Republican Convention- not so proud however, that our freedom-hating Democrat governor tried to chase us away. How DARE he?
_**This is what the anti-American, anti-free speech Democrats do now, isn't it? They act like Republicans don't even have a right to exist!**_
In fact, the news here today is that Pelosi called Republicans the "enemies of the state".
Pelosi has gone full Stalinist. You never go full Stalinist. Rep. Steve Scalise from Louisiana was shot and almost killed by a deranged "Bernie Bro" because he believed Bernie's insane rhetoric like this.
**_If Pelosi's rhetoric gets someone killed, she should get tossed in jail as an accessory to murder._**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg)
---

_But you know what gives me so much hope? All these great Americans coming together in support of President Trump._

**I was particularly pleased to meet fellow North Carolinian Madison Cawthorn, who will be the next Congressman from Western NC. I look forward to joining him next year!**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg)
---

**_The difference with the Democrat Convention is striking. They banished God; excuse violence; blame innocent people; disparage job creators; and call anyone who doesn't agree with them, a "racist". _**

You cannot govern a nation you hate, and yet, that's what Biden's Democrats are trying to do.

_THAT is why we must win. THAT is why we need to push hard here!_

**We are all God's children and Americans- and we need leadership who sees us as valued and equal!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg) Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will love America and help Americans!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg). Our country needs us NOW! Let's stand up now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gRjxziolB3Nxmng&b=XAtG7NHQonGUrvoGOAE4Pg) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

Hey friend, do you have a second?

Our monthly fundraising deadline hits at midnight on August 31st, and this month here at the Holcomb Crew we’re excited to have a new way for you to get involved.

**friend, we want your support, and we want you to be able to put some skin in the game.**

_Every dollar matters and every donor matters in the final sprint to Election Day. _

If you want to help us make sure Governor Holcomb can keep building One Indiana for All for the next four years, please donate $8.27 and join our Calendar Campaign below.

name: research@markwarnerva.com
subject: SURVEY: What is the most urgent issue during the pandemic?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| What is the _**most urgent**_ issue Congress should address during the pandemic? | [Share your thoughts with Mark](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db39/53d9897e/5423fd6c/1c8834ea/312002430/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-pandemic")
---
Derek --

Mark Warner is doing everything he can to help Virginians stay safe, healthy, and financially secure during this challenging time. He understands that people are frustrated with the government's response to this national crisis -- and he wants your feedback on what needs to be done differently.

**The president failed to take the pandemic seriously and still has not offered any national strategy to combat it and protect us.** Then, when House Democrats voted to give us a second round of financial relief back in May, the GOP-controlled Senate dragged its feet taking any action and left millions struggling.

**We have a chance to make a change in our government on Election Day.** But Mark understands that struggling Virginians can't wait for an election -- they need help right now.

**[So will you tell Mark what you think he should fight for _right now_ to help Virginians through this difficult time?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db39/53d9897e/5423fd6c/1c8834ea/312002430/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-pandemic")**

Thank you,

The Warner Research Team

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db39/53d9897e/5423fd6c/1c8834e9/312002430/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200826_s_1_fl__728__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db39/53d9897e/5423fd6c/1c8834e8/312002430/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

In his address, we can be sure that Trump will directly attack Joe. **But, we _ALL_ know that his attacks on Joe are nothing new.**

From the outset of this election, Trump has been laser-focused on tearing down Joe's candidacy. He knew Joe was his biggest threat in a general election, and because of committed grassroots supporters like you, we made his worst nightmare come true.

In fact, when Trump stood on the White House lawn last fall and openly called on the Chinese government to investigate debunked conspiracy theories about Joe Biden, our campaign first launched our Beat Trump Fund.

We had a surge of donations as a result, and we have to make sure we have another big surge before Trump speaks tonight. There's no better message that we can send to Trump and the RNC that we're going to have the resources to make him a one-term president!

[So please, Peter, if you're feeling fired up and ready to go, will you make one of the 150,000 donations we still need into our Beat Trump Fund before Trump speaks tonight, and fund our work to defeat him this fall?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B1_surgedonations_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B1_surgedonations_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

If you believe that we must make it clear today that we are going to defeat him this fall, will you help us send that message today by making sure we have a surge of donations into our Beat Trump Fund? "" | "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" In his address, we can be sure that Trump will directly attack Joe. But, we ALL know that his attacks on Joe are nothing new. From the outset of this election, Trump has been laser-focused on tearing down Joe's candidacy. He knew Joe was his biggest threat in a general election, and because of committed grassroots supporters like you, we made his worst nightmare come true. In fact, when Trump stood on the White House lawn last fall and openly called on the Chinese government to investigate debunked conspiracy theories about Joe Biden, our campaign first launched our Beat Trump Fund. We had a surge of donations as a result, and we have to make sure we have another big surge before Trump speaks tonight. We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

subject: what America needs right now

body:
Here’s the person I think our country needs in Washington right now. Join me in supporting them! | |
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=8f97915e2d3b4926ad89b484018a683b&_e=4GhczcIerrYCgGaCNf7Pk5RNwghxyxDZvShcvslKgS09O4DjaEWZewGT-LKoJXeNsgnOtPC1hzyXsKPQXn4I2Omt8XrXx67P1CGJ-Ics3kf3takqoVRWlQ-6BD0qszSQ497x4kGnkReAO7JbBeesWomRRqRFkRW8LdsAk2kDGuCRaF4nTwRoD18nC2nN2FTibPBDEe7F7syI926QMugyOB8YaGpAk2RUhYJHEq5_p4zqMHM36dyzsQICy_XhhTxX5H2MSEUoAy2MhQBCrKfdbKJmKyDmps6nEKEMmA0onHAjW6mUwoi0e7i0qZlR-jEx_lb8uDNIIsPJS9IH1ZB-AzuttPr7adShtBBNRaQhO7RySOs1AduVgpu7cEbLn0sSC_1C8cObw3m-sxj0nKjwMMkvZPR6_HIrsUbbFx5TbQ3dxsNhJa_4H4u3choSjhSTtZoCCLyBnS8SsvNh1u-rKBYsI43k1kPR16L87vbalXu94TXMK11s_VjPLO5NfkER)

Friend,

Last night I spoke at the Republican National Convention about how we need four more years with President Trump in office:
_Since his first day in office, President Trump has fought tirelessly to deliver results for all Americans, despite the Democrats’ baseless and illegal impeachment sham and the media’s endless obsession with it...I believe in the wisdom and spirit of the American people to elect the only candidate who is capable of protecting the American Dream: Donald J. Trump._
Even as our nation grapples with a global health crisis, economic uncertainty, and rampant violence, the President is leading with strength and putting America back on the path to prosperity.

**During these tough times, we need strong conservative leaders in Washington who will continue our President’s legacy of getting things done. Matt Mowers is one of those leaders. **

Like President Trump, Matt Mowers has a record of results. While he was in the State Department, Mowers tackled some of the biggest issues facing our country, including:
* North Korea
* Immigration reform
* Defeating ISIS
* Ensuring religious freedom

Mowers is a man of action, not a pencil pusher. That’s why I want him working alongside me in the House to move America forward. **I’m doing all that I can to support Mowers, and I hope you’ll join me by[chipping in $5](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=8f97915e2d3b4926ad89b484018a683b&_e=4GhczcIerrYCgGaCNf7Pk5RNwghxyxDZvShcvslKgS09O4DjaEWZewGT-LKoJXeNsgnOtPC1hzyXsKPQXn4I2GIf2Izjci9-HGmZohz2PRUTdCbC3d5CwpYqdc2bmYXeAjyb-6ZEG1Loh8Hqr8l4lz4xPHJJIVYW-odGI5ap013McQgowZvP0JCub0GTxt7e7HHzIGXaZEYjA0jYSmerHM2EHNdQis5kstY0Zr_Scg2QzkkoyMbfAJ7o4kChwB0ECcebwJiYHPZfh8KTmI-knL3LMr1tB5T5-AwIKsY-9hYSNURQ--rQGF9iPjv2fin7Sm7h2WGR1x_ihsnK0TjOm-dZv0nuyZevcHazNw_a59AwwQjzZ3AzDPNS9ONCLWI69F55tCugBbRv4R3ODwU92i1v_06N_whqr2mvK0g4dLQyc6vPeqb85ssRfZXGjuxSsjFlciqDKFCCgGgZDyYPZBZc5fq9haOJUS4FVzHUtCuaf2t318NqAKfsqQgxR8lM) or whatever you can to his campaign today.**

subject: Voting starts sooner than you think...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Every registered voter in California will receive a mail-in ballot this year. That means while Election Day is *technically* 68 days away, Californians will be able to cast their votes starting in October!

With just over a month before ballots drop, we need to kick Linda's re-election campaign into overdrive ASAP!

Right now, we're roughly $1,200 behind our grassroots fundraising goal for the month.

Will you help make sure Linda is the one fighting for us in Congress by making a donation today? Even $5 will make a difference!

Thank you so much!

-- Sánchez HQ

| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

subject: The Pences got it right at the RNC last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Mike and Karen Pence hit the nail on the head at the RNC last night. Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469694?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=604e80b7d8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

I hope everyone was able to tune into the RNC last night, especially to see Mike and Karen Pence speak.

It was awesome to see our fellow Hoosier accept his renomination as Donald Trump’s running mate for the 2020 presidential election, and he and his wife inspired us all with their heartfelt words.

**_And they’re right._ If we want to Keep America Great, we need four more years of President Trump’s administration. He has done more for the American people in the last three and half years than Joe Biden has done in Washington in nearly five decades**.

President Trump continually puts people first, and tirelessly fights for the right of every single citizen to pursue their American Dream, regardless of race, age, gender, religion, economic status, or anything else.

We need every single grassroots supporter to show their support for the Trump-Pence ticket by donating now. The radical left is hard at work for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, but we know they don’t represent Hoosier values.

[**Help us fight back by chipping in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can now!**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=59a5689dca&e=1acd9bb3d6)

We can win the White House again in 2020, but only if we all stand with our former Indiana Governor and current Vice President to re-elect President Trump!

Thanks for your support,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Downing?=
subject: Our Land Board
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA, REPUBLICAN
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **_OUR LAND BOARD_** **As a one of five members of the Land Board, the office of State Auditor is crucial in keeping Conservatives in control of our economy and our jobs. The board of land commissioners oversee the use of 5.2 million acres of Montana's Trust Lands, as well as the funds those lands bring in.** **The State Trust Lands were specifically set aside to fund education. Last year, State trust sections generated $45.9 million to fund K-12 education. These trust lands are also vital not only for recreational and sportsman’s use, but also for timber harvests, natural resource development, farming, and grazing.** **As a businessman, Troy Downing understands how important it will be to jump start our economy after the covid-19 pandemic. Now, more than ever, we need to support the job-creating and food creating industries that we all rely on. The jobs we need to bring our economy back.

As an avid outdoorsman and conservation advocate, he also understands the importance of true stewardship and public access of our State resources for hiking, hunting, and fishing.** **Troy Downing is a doer, not a talker. Actions- not words.** **For years, Troy has spent his time, money, and many long days helping build, maintain, and advocate for public trails across the state for all Montanans to enjoy our public lands. ** **Troy’s dedication to good-paying jobs and public access to lands is far from a political talking point--it’s a duty. ** **Troy Downing has proven again and again, not only by words, but by his actions the need for responsible use and sustained yield, as well as preservation and job creation for coming generations. ** **Troy is ready to get to work protecting Montana consumers, fighting for lower insurance and prescription drug prices, working to bring more competition to Montana, making Montana more business-friendly- All to increase choices, increase prosperity, and help boost the economy while using Trust Lands to do what they were set aside to do- Fund out schools. **
#

Spicer&Co DNC Coverage:
* Congresswoman Elise Stefanik reacts to the DNC convention (https://youtu.be/g812Ehv1VY8?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)
* Leo Terrell discusses the black vote and how Kamala Harris will impact it (https://youtu.be/Vz9dE-yM53o?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)
* Former Governor Rick Scott breaks down night 3 of the DNC convention (https://youtu.be/lGF1gAhOm5M?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)
* The Left continues to push for mail-in-voting (https://youtu.be/LwGYuVc1Eg8?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)

Spicer&Co RNC Coverage:
* Kim Klacik, candidate for Congress from Baltimore, previews her RNC speech (https://youtu.be/qtFZUCspukU?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)
* John Pence lays out the agenda released by the Trump Pence campaign for the next 4 years (https://youtu.be/nHWn4TaRj5w?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)
* Abby Johnson discusses her pro-life remarks ahead of night 2 of the RNC (https://youtu.be/b-c51oRyAzY?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)
* RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks explains the RNC's mission and message (https://youtu.be/tkrFI3C00ZE?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)
* Matt Schlapp reacts to seeing his wife featured in an RNC video with the strong women of the Trump administration (https://youtu.be/8Yvr0eJ19L8?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193)

https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism/dp/154605944X?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193

Leading America Update

I'm finishing up the final edits on my manuscript this week and getting closer to the release of my second book, "Leading America". I'm looking forward to it's release and you all reading it.

I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. It's even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but I would appreciate your support in pre-ordering it now!

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3e679cbd12-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_07_30_06_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3e679cbd12-&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=ff4f928646-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_26_04_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-ff4f928646-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

subject: Sen. Bob Dole Endorses Mann for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

I am honored to receive **Senator Bob Dole’s endorsement** for the Big First Congressional District. A native of Russell, Senator Dole previously represented the “Big First” for 8 years, prior to his service in the United States Senate.

Kansans know no finer statesman and public servant than Senator Bob Dole. Growing up in northwest Kansas, my family always held Senator Dole in the highest regard. To earn his support today is humbling and sets a high bar for the leadership that Kansans expect from this District.

I vow to be a strong, conservative voice advocating for our rural Kansas values.

Yours in the fight,
Tracey

name: MAGASOTA
subject: Trump Rally Minnesota 2020
body:
| Peter \-- Save the date! Celebrate our President! **MAGASOTA is hosting a Trump rally on September 19, 2020.** **The time is 3 p.m. - 6 p.m.** **Location:** **Castle Rock Bar & Grill** **27998 Chippendale Ave** **Northfield MN** We have a great line up of speakers you don't want to miss. A MAGA hat to the first 200 people. Enter our drawing. We have 50 Keep American Great Flags and American flags. Music. Trump yard signs. MAGASOTA swag! Food and drink specials. _Please share this email with all your Trump loving friends_. **You don't want to miss this opportunity to celebrate our great President with like minded supporters.** Please go to Facebook and share the event. [https://www.facebook.com/events/936680403480334](https://www.magasota.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOUKyocjgaQyelNHvXHd9Lg9&e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_rally_minnesota_2020&n=1) More information will be added to the Facebook event. If you would like to financially support this rally please donate at [https://www.magasota.com/contribute](https://www.magasota.com/contribute?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_rally_minnesota_2020&n=2) A check can also be mailed to 19600 Foxfield Drive Prior Lake MN 55372 **This is going to be the best event of 2020!** -Michele Even

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Who said it: Donald Trump or Loren Culp?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN) Friend, **Who said it: Donald Trump or my opponent, Loren Culp?** → He compared himself to Rosa Parks because he took on the "civil rights" of 2nd Amendment activists by refusing to enforce a law passed by a majority of voters. → He compared officers who did enforce that law to Nazi military officers. → He called the state-mandated mask requirement "unconstitutional and ridiculous." The answer? Though these quotes sound as Trumpy as you can get, they were all said by my Republican opponent, Loren Culp. The parallels don't stop there: Both Trump and Culp weren't taken seriously. Both went on to be the nominees for their party. One got elected in 2016 and the other might get elected in 2020._Unless we fight back._ **Coming up next week is our first end-of-month deadline since the general election officially began. So we set an aggressive end-of-month goal of raising $40,000 by midnight on Monday.[Will you donate $5 or more right now to fight back against this homegrown Trumpism and make sure we don't elect a mini-Trump this November?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10869?t=4&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10870?t=5&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10871?t=6&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10872?t=7&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN)

| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10874?t=9&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10869?t=10&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN)
---
I want to be clear about this threat. Republicans running for governor across the country are raking in huge campaign checks. The Republican Governors Association has millions to unleash against the few Democrats up for reelection this cycle. They only have four governorships to flip in 2020, and they have an unparalleled war chest at their disposal.
Washington voters start voting sooner than you'd expect. We must be ready for the attacks and even an "October surprise." We're running out of time, and we've seen what happens when we take a win for granted. We can't afford to do that here.
There's simply too much at stake. I hope you agree -- **[and I hope you'll make a donation today to fund the fight now through Election Day.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10869?t=11&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10869?t=12&akid=8129%2E868730%2EQkylcN)

name: Kara Eastman
subject: hell no, Bacon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
This changes EVERYTHING.
|
---

| | Peter, I have news. And it's infuriating.

Don Bacon is lying about his healthcare record in a new ad to mislead voters.

He makes the outrageous claim that he fought for pre-existing condition protections and to lower drug prices.

**_[All while touting his votes for bills that would leave those with pre-existing conditions at the mercy of insane pricing and send drug prices skyrocketing.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e826/77d4c309/219da37c/2636131d/2331597007/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200827_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

I'm going to pull back the curtain a bit -- because this is too important.

**_[To counter Bacon's lies, I need to run TV ads that expose his true record on healthcare to voters across the district. For this to work, I have to ramp up our spending TODAY. And need your help raising $4,200 to cover it. Will you rush $5 now? >>](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e826/77d4c309/219da37c/2636131d/2331597007/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200827_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Peter, you know I never ask you to chip in unless winning this race depends on it.

I'm barely clinging to a one point lead over Don Bacon, so every voter I reach is critical.

I have to act quickly. The GOP isn't wasting time and neither can we. **[So I'm personally asking, Peter: Will you rush $5 now?](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e826/77d4c309/219da37c/2636131d/2331597007/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200827_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** | | [Chip in $5 now >>](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e826/77d4c309/219da37c/2636131d/2331597007/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200827_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

Friend,

Something's happening in Georgia.

Six years ago, the GOP won here by 8%. Two years later, that margin narrowed to 5%. Then in 2018, Stacey Abrams lost the Governor's race by just 1.4% (only 55,000 votes!!), running against the man overseeing the election.

**Since then, Georgia has seen OVER 750,000 NEW VOTERS become registered and eligible to vote, and Democrats SHATTERED turnout records in the June Primary.**

In poll after poll, Jon Ossoff is leading or statistically tied with Sen. David Perdue. And Joe Biden is neck and neck with Donald Trump here in Georgia too.

**Friend, 2020 is the year Georgia goes for the Democrats.**

While Mitch McConnell and the GOP have committed over $30 million (!!!) so far to stop Jon from winning, we're relying on small-dollar donations to power this grassroots campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: After Two Deaths During Kenosha Protests, Trump Sending Federal Troops to 'Restore Law and Order'
body:
President Donald Trump said Wednesday he will send federal troops into Kenosha to assist local law enforcement after a third night of violence | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc60494240&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **After Two Deaths During Kenosha Protests, Trump Sending Federal Troops to 'Restore Law and Order'**

“President Donald Trump said Wednesday he will send federal troops into Kenosha to assist local law enforcement after a third night of violence in the Wisconsin city left two people dead,” Meghan Roos reports in _Newsweek_.

“We will NOT stand for looting, arson, violence, and lawlessness on American streets. My team just got off the phone with [Wisconsin Governor Tony] Evers who agreed to accept federal assistance,” the President tweeted yesterday.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95ce04a25a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Trump has asked all Americans in the path of Hurricane Laura to stay safe and follow their local guidance on evacuations and safety precautions. The National Hurricane Center is predicting continued hurricane-force winds which could create widespread flooding and cause serious damage. Read more in [WDSU News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22e563ee66&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “According to our internal data, a record 90% of veterans trust the care they get at VA, and during the pandemic, Northeast Ohio demonstrated why we’ve earned that trust,” Veterans Affairs Secretary Robert Wilkie writes. “VA Northeast Ohio adopted a testing approach in the nursing home it runs allowing it to quickly isolate patients when positive [COVID-19] test results came back.” Read more from [Cleveland.com](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b54b44af8d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “An elderly man’s jaw was broken in a sickening caught-on-camera attack as he tried to protect a store that was eventually torched during the Kenosha protests,” Lee Brown reports. “‘He was trying to defend his building and they beat the s–t out of him!’ the videographer sobbed in the clip.” Read more in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=167f29fd5d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eab9cb639a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4dd304c7dd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0d43f60e28)
---

| Dear Friend,

I am very happy to announce that Senator Joe Donnelly has endorsed my campaign to become the next Congresswoman for IN-02.

Indiana’s 2nd District is Joe’s home. For years, Joe served Indiana with distinction as a United States Senator after serving as the US Representative for this district.

[**I know with Joe and other community leaders at my side, we _will_ be victorious in November. Will you stand with Joe and me and support my campaign?**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7f1ec6e124&e=5886ca081d)

name: Troy Nehls
subject: ** 60-Day Victory Drive **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
🚨🚨🚨 See our critical goal inside. Tap or click here >>
Friend, There has perhaps never been more at stake for our nation – and the 2020 elections are heating up fast.

We’re on the FRONT LINE here in TX-22 to take back the House. We must ramp up.

This open seat race is a top battleground. _**The Pelosi and AOC machine is DESPERATE to “flip” this seat, to protect their grip on power!**_

We’ve set an aggressive August end-of-month goal, and we can’t afford to fall short. We need to raise $30,000 to keep our fight to keep this seat “RED” on track.

Our 60-Day Victory Drive kicks off on September 4th!

**[Will you make a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution to help us reach this vital goal?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/c7a2e68a14b90defc3d6b838967d376c/35193) **

Every dollar we raise online helps us get out my message, through ads and grassroots efforts, to fire up voters and turn them out on election day.

And if we’re short now, we could ultimately fall short on Election Day...

**Don’t let outsiders buy this seat**. With everything going on in our country, we need someone who’s served our local community for decades and backed by our local community to be our voice in Congress.

Our end-of-month deadline is coming up fast, next Monday at midnight.

**[Respond now, to help us get this effort off to a strong start!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/63999a41a81fd96cc3d6b838967d376c/35193) **

Thanks, Friend.

\- Troy [Rush a $5 Donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/dd2c2976fa2b3d43c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Rush a $10 Donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/087d3a57292fea7cc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Rush a $25 Donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/b38c4e54d18dc08bc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Rush a $50 Donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/abe45388c3f9642bc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Donate Another Amount >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/2b9618e784f25cf5c3d6b838967d376c/35193) id:2020-08-18-14:10:29:356t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/bb9c92111932d48ac3d6b838967d376c/35193) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6a39328be4f5186/8c4fd7c413bbbc92c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Invitation: Join Wesley Hunt and Carmen Crenshaw for a Cafecito con Carmen!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Cafecito con Carmen
Join Wesley and Carmen for Coffee and Conversation**

On Saturday, August 29th, from 10:00am to 12:00pm, Wesley will join Republican National Hispanic Assembly (RNHA) Texas State Chair Carmen Crenshaw to discuss issues important to the Houston community prior to the 2020 election. In light of the continued challenges of COVID-19, the event will comply with necessary safety guidelines; the health and safety of all attendees is the utmost priority.

For over 50 years, the RNHA has advocated for Hispanic-American issues and interests within the Republican Party. The efforts of the RNHA have helped the Republican Party become the dynamic and diverse party that it is today.

With just a little over two months until election day, we hope you will join Wesley and Carmen as they delve into the topics most important to Houston.

_Register[here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c22a4bfcacda41d4b045533711077bd4&_e=ZUwMpn8bxRakJ_xt1R-XhB1VW-b6SB2jxhYbxrSABxlmEvqMoktkDMwqch5aua8wRXBF6pNAJhnSaVmf84oFx8gVlp1MsnwML7zvH-dj0YqC9KI7DqjG4PpUvogW783Wwcn5Wp1osn9-R6A1yOhWuWdIiThKADjmSr8VJmvUHPuvZnLaa3EidHt_Ptg0Dk5qV8uqYVYqUWaNz79Qqcw1AxyihdwSalpCqBC3KLk8mvHBM-iD1lPLOD9RwNbDKhLmfhkiDF14KQvYl9aAs9h7LWz4EeEEnlV71cuWGAV-Jx4%3D)._
If you have any questions, please contact us at info@wesleyfortexas.com.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c22a4bfcacda41d4b045533711077bd4&_e=ZUwMpn8bxRakJ_xt1R-XhKgh054Vou1J-djiG0Lw1GhlPvUshVI9QBgV4pAk7i4eTUaYmjQ_Rm-pIetp54n25t7YAPmzZUCdiof4Gqh1S6XZ_lVzm5Dkl0K2tTo-tU7IwF6ZoWpdt4EorD2Ykmroe9bBYYyhmifOHH3099ZWYU01ij-OtI_NcVRPiq3ydhWtS9xBcpN1Uva4PApqB7Qdbj2C19xj636UkVOoWhwvgBUCBxY2qu5WoBlKzwr-bKZc-JLXiMFmQ-gOK_G2rZ5ypq1UqgrmnJo35GH61r-KLGc%3D)****
