Friend,

_Nancy went on CBS News and made a powerful statement about why she’s running for Congress. _

**She spoke bluntly about why her opponent is not right for the Lowcountry — he’s a diehard partisan who has built a strong record of putting Nancy Pelosi’s agenda over the people who sent him to Washington. **

Nancy has done the hard work of reaching across the aisle and delivering results on the issues that South Carolinians care about the most. She’s spent her entire life in the Lowcountry — she knows the problems that our district faces firsthand.

**There’s too much at stake to send our opponent back to Congress for another two years. Simply put, this is the election of our lifetime. **

The future of the American Dream is at stake, and we need a **real** leader who will get **real** results — someone who will put the Lowcountry first every single time they step on the floor of the House.

_We can’t afford to be represented by a partisan who takes their marching orders from Nancy Pelosi. If people are tired of buying what Nancy Pelosi and progressives like my opponent are selling, they should send a New Nancy to Congress. _

Use the button below to watch Nancy’s interview and donate to help her finish strong and deliver new leadership to the Lowcountry in November.
[**Watch Nancy and Donate —>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=035d2ce7b300458cadb5dd4115a440ef&_e=Bmx7UmuUSmV2Dg5Q9fIBhcI1xIVms_Ydqx42e43-JfWWKxRkqMpG3BH5NZHfE535la8tzBkyFpvCo0SgJjBDJhJg-IsLyWBsQk9tq13R-RR8G7D98jnLLDwZkhi5u2q0I33dNPLlqLVh2Rwm1z4NG8_BHikMMRFMPG2FbTlNFO7yXl13qUZDr9W9h46Y9sJuKt1dpDsCHz32QHZ6Bbot_zDw8M4jww6x3a6_ja8ZqIAqkSIe_ghbnds101c7rImyXxF9i5gnmjj50MP5KINHJ4lMd6bqwtkWXXFMtxpDTN8jzl6BmDrv4bmGvJFewv2EYUy145p85jnwJtSz4Fb4ZHZ15IP04aAnUBfCWxVuAoSeawA5JUkNFcky9Sbck72IOyu-8xp7pcgCg1DqDKxW0W8QwE1NobbfYB1YbwceG4DEGc5mA4KKKPATy6RUfoBcymQYznNEPKoYjQM1D2Pmaagqbkw4PhNeOnCrfyJRKnY%3D)

She spoke bluntly about why her opponent is not right for the Lowcountry — he’s a diehard partisan who has built a strong record of putting Nancy Pelosi’s agenda over the people who sent him to Washington. Nancy has done the hard work of reaching across the aisle and delivering results on the issues that South Carolinians care about the most. She’s spent her entire life in the Lowcountry — she knows the problems that our district faces firsthand. There’s too much at stake to send our opponent back to Congress for another two years. Simply put, this is the election of our lifetime. The future of the American Dream is at stake, and we need a real leader who will get real results — someone who will put the Lowcountry first every single time they step on the floor of the House. We can’t afford to be represented by a partisan who takes their marching orders from Nancy Pelosi. If people are tired of buying what Nancy Pelosi and progressives like my opponent are selling, they should send a New Nancy to Congress. Use the button below to watch Nancy’s interview and donate to help her finish strong and deliver new leadership to the Lowcountry in November. Thank you for your support, Mace Fundraising Team | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: Asking for $25 to elect a Commander in Chief who would actually lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We can elect a Commander in Chief who leads with empathy, honor and compassion. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Peter --

I know you're busy, so I'll get straight to the point.

I'm emailing for a donation to elect Joe Biden before Donald Trump takes the stage tonight. Joe needs 130,000 more donations, and I'm asking you to be one of them.

**We can elect a Commander in Chief who leads with empathy, honor and compassion--but we can only do so if we have the resources to win.**

[So, Peter, will you pitch in $25 to the Beat Trump Fund to fuel Joe and Kamala's campaign right now?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [$25 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&express_lane=true")

---
| [$250 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=250&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&express_lane=true")

| [$500 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=500&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&express_lane=true")

| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Those of us who have served this nation in uniform understand how important it is for our Commander in Chief to recognize the magnitude of the sacrifices our troops make on their orders.

Donald Trump doesn't understand the meaning of the word sacrifice. He still won't even publicly condemn Russia for reportedly putting bounties on our Troops' heads.

[There's a word for that, Peter: disgraceful. And every day that Trump remains our Coward in Chief is a threat to our national security.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Peter, Joe Biden is the leader we need to meet this moment and turn the page on this dark chapter in our country's history.

He understands the sacrifices that military families make. He has felt the unimaginable pain of burying children and other loved ones, then shown the incredible resilience necessary to recover--resilience that America needs now as much as ever.

_And above all, Joe will fight for every American's family just as he has for his own._

But Peter, the outcome of this election is going to come down to who can reach the most voters.

We've heard three nights of the Republicans' dark and divisive agenda, and between the RNC and Trump's campaign, they have over half a billion dollars to drown out Joe's message.

[That's why this goal is so important -- Joe's campaign is powered by grassroots donors and he needs your support to make sure our Beat Trump Fund is fully charged by the time Trump takes the stage tonight.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

[Peter, if you can, will you be one of the supporters Joe needs to step up with a $25 contribution before Trump goes on the air?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.27_B2_Duckworth_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Thank you so much,

Tammy Duckworth
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa8/572885672/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa7/572885672/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa6/572885672/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa5/572885672/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa4/572885672/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa3/572885672/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa2/572885672/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa1/572885672/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa0/572885672/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5f9f/572885672/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa2/572885672/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5f9e/572885672/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5fa1/572885672/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b024/1cd0ac28/15004a160/357f5f9d/572885672/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Margaret Good
subject: big deal

Friend,

We’ve already raised $25,000 online from grassroots supporters this month, which is a big deal. But in order to defeat Vern Buchanan and his corporate PAC-funded campaign, I’m asking if you can step up again before our August 31st deadline.

We’ve set an ambitious new goal to raise another $25,000 over the next five days, and I’m counting on you to help us reach it. It’s a big goal, but I believe that our grassroots-powered campaign can overcome all the odds to defeat Vern and flip this seat from red to blue.

**There’s no better time to make your first investment in this campaign, and I’m hoping you can help provide the resources we need to get our message out to voters before vote-by-mail ballots begin landing in mailboxes in less than a month!**

**[Please, can you make your first contribution right now to help us reach our $25,000 fundraising goal before the end of the month, so we can get our message out to voters here on the Suncoast before ballots arrive in voters’ mailboxes?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18880717/242630693/1073285021?refcode2=f5c85fa8-b0e8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emci=1cc52155-b0e8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=f5c85fa8-b0e8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&refcode=082720-es-eom-fr-1-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWM4NWZhOC1iMGU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlyR_5ZbrRvRkP2t4LNmRes7revuLscRmu5enTgztMk=)**

Together, we can bring real change to Florida and to our nation. We can bring accountability to Washington. We can protect our land and water. We can ensure that everyone has access to the health care they need. We can put the people first. And we can make this future a reality, but only if we fight for it.

I’ll never stop fighting for you and our shared values, and it would be an absolute honor to represent you in Washington.

Thank you.

Margaret

Margaret Good for Congress

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. subject: Congratulate President Trump

body:
By signing his card and leaving a note.
---

Friend,

Can you keep a secret?

President Trump is about to officially accept the**Republican Nomination for President of the United States,** and we want to surprise him with something BIG.

We want to give him a card FILLED with over **1,000,000** signatures and notes written by Patriots from all around the Country _congratulating him on his renomination._

Because YOU are a TOP SUPPORTER, we are giving you **EARLY-ACCESS** so that YOU can sign the card before anyone else.

We're offering you **EARLY-ACCESS** for the**NEXT HOUR.** Be sure to act fast to guarantee President Trump sees your congratulatory message FIRST.

**_[Please sign the ONLY Official Card to congratulate President Trump in the NEXT HOUR and make sure he sees your name and message FIRST.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=45e2ebd261552e6a751ed3bf3c9c25828ced97380f5f82ff8a212ebf05f266210d19d9fb4886260c62cc2c687342de03ecbe6109165ae02f "Please add your name NOW to publicly stand with your President and his efforts to restore law and order in our Nation’s communities. >>")_**
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=45e2ebd261552e6a49b7e7d7b10b43489e0e43f5f82a5c448432253708ebc07b449437ca5592dd560b2ca444c05bf4a925b7ffe49b207985)
By signing the **ONLY Official Card to congratulate President Trump,** you'll be saying LOUD AND CLEAR that REAL Americans support THEIR President.

We're giving him the card TONIGHT and we know he'll be excited to see YOUR NAME on it.

_**[Add your name to the Official Card to congratulate President Trump IMMEDIATELY and make sure he sees your name and message FIRST.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=45e2ebd261552e6ab6bdec900b68837d6a52678a2986008d532bb19a1c1d9d596a00002057ebdcdf5c3b2ed149fc13f68fe20ba30eba5d22 "Please add your name RIGHT NOW to stand with President Trump and to get on the list he sees.")**_

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020

**[SIGN THE CARD NOW>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9bd278b582dd7ebb54a90771ae84c154d3340b8eb087dc7e20c99b102b9f8f33f0f7e8adfce3dc440290372374ca8198860e370a23827056)**

body:

In just four days, we'll know whether or not we hit our end-of-August fundraising goal.

We'll know whether we're ready to make all the investments we need to make in September.

And we'll know whether we'll be able to fully carry out our plans for grassroots organizing to elect Democrats like Elizabeth across the country this November.

**There's only one group of people who will decide whether this team hits our August goal by Monday's deadline: grassroots supporters like you.**

**[If making a donation would make sense for you right now, can you chip in $2 or any amount to help elect Warren Democrats and keep up the fight for big, structural change?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852506c/45c30650/1c3d8d7b9/66e82337/2233907748/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE1Rl9FT01fTEFVX1RfMjAyMDA4MjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU15F_EOM_LAU_T_20200827_V1S2_P")**

Elizabeth has stayed in the fight to make sure we win the White House, take back the Senate, hold onto our House majority, flip state legislatures across the country, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot who put working people first.

She's now endorsed over 100 Democratic candidates for 2020, and this grassroots team -- including volunteers across the country -- is mobilizing to make sure every voter can make their voice heard safely.

If we do everything we can -- every day from now through November 3 -- we can elect Democrats who believe in bold reform. And as long as we stay in the fight in 2021 and beyond, we can make that reform a reality -- by rooting out corruption and making our country work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

[If you're able to, please make a donation to help make sure Democrats like Elizabeth win in November -- and help power the fight to level the playing field for working people.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852506c/45c30650/1c3d8d7b9/66e82337/2233907748/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE1Rl9FT01fTEFVX1RfMjAyMDA4MjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU15F_EOM_LAU_T_20200827_V1S2_P")

Thanks,

Team Warren

We'll know whether we're ready to make all the investments we need to make in September. | | | "" In just four days, we'll know whether or not we hit our end-of-August fundraising goal. We'll know whether we're ready to make all the investments we need to make in September. And we'll know whether we'll be able to fully carry out our plans for grassroots organizing to elect Democrats like Elizabeth across the country this November. There's only one group of people who will decide whether this team hits our August goal by Monday's deadline: grassroots supporters like you. "" Elizabeth has stayed in the fight to make sure we win the White House, take back the Senate, hold onto our House majority, flip state legislatures across the country, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot who put working people first. She's now endorsed over 100 Democratic candidates for 2020, and this grassroots team -- including volunteers across the country -- is mobilizing to make sure every voter can make their voice heard safely. If we do everything we can -- every day from now through November 3 -- we can elect Democrats who believe in bold reform. And as long as we stay in the fight in 2021 and beyond, we can make that reform a reality -- by rooting out corruption and making our country work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. "" Thanks, Team Warren | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Women for Scheller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
**LISA SCHELLER RELEASES THIRD COALITION**
**“WOMEN FOR SCHELLER”** FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Brooke Race
Info@schellerforcongress.com

Allentown, Pa. – Yesterday, the Scheller Campaign was proud to announce its third coalition, Women for Scheller. Lisa Scheller strongly stands with women and equality of opportunity. This is personal for her because unlike career politicians, she has spent most of her career running a business and knows what it’s like to overcome obstacles. Unlike Susan Wild, Lisa has hired women and promoted women. The chair of this coalition is three amazing women. Josephine Ferro of Monroe County, a Register of Wills and Recorder of Deeds. Margaret Ferraro of Northampton, a retired teacher. And Beth Spero of Lehigh, president of the Lehigh County Republican Women's Club.

These Women released the following statement:

“I support Lisa Scheller because our representative should be someone who has dealt not just with successes but with hardships as well. Someone who understands the challenges women face and how to meet those challenges of family, friends, elderly relatives, jobs and households. She is not someone who is looking for a political career but instead, public service. Not just for women, but for all citizens. She knows opportunities exist for all who are willing to work just as she will work for us in Washington.” - Josephine Ferro

“Lisa is a common sense businesswoman whose views are in line with the mainstream of the Lehigh Valley. She has overcome adversity and is CEO of a major business in PA. Lisa also sponsors scholarships so underprivileged, deserving students have the opportunity to learn life skills that train them for success in the job market. We need common sense in the lawmakers of our country. The radical, far out ideas aren’t the down to earth values of the working class who built this country and the Lehigh Valley, that is why the right option is Lisa Sheller.” - Margaret Ferraro

“Lisa believes deeply in the values and priorities of sensible people who love our country. She is smart and supports legislation that works for everyday American families: a strong military to protect our nation, stopping unrestrained illegal immigration, responsible energy policy that will not take jobs from Pennsylvanians, freedom of religion, and enhancing quality education for all. I enthusiastically endorse Lisa Scheller, and am proud to know such a motivated, fearless, outstanding person and leader in our community. She will do great things for us in Congress. -Beth Spero [SIGN UP FOR WOMEN FOR SCHELLER](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=031b943d644f4e5b963966ae702d523e&_e=zd2voa2Vghaprv8z_9TGa8ewEUMBf_kouC0d3NQlUkRez8HIV7nFtvQKzJRaOMCkxWPEQyabQnA7qt3eLLlMUv4L1NTvUzeP6_Xm0APsIE8yL0zy9ck0flkGeAJqDmP3rEcvitieEapprgEaZevJDpkeWkFCcDVCR655N-lVgqAe1-QcPCi70U2F_CwQvdUf0xmvE0gBSQ0xgGdXAsFZDIZvQCPciuzgTnC2IU__WExO4BPjsYqJRJyT4yWMEXt3ew0MJ2krWicbtOBI54wqe5abRC3E4s9z3T_NmCyaqDY%3D) Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. [Unsubscribe](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=031b943d644f4e5b963966ae702d523e&_t=dFynlVCILSVGY54V8WPd19__KjIN2BmFMq5oRtWhkOIdLgdPKT7y99R-SfyElw-X96JsWl7_avlAYJ7SN2CH0O9qamRb-My8AAx5qPnv071JjRfcvzh35gh9JocD_eE_SfZpGookBTUTLSPEYbWUJJvOqGzhMb1wfeXTBluj514%3D)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Voting is safe & secure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The governor and Secretary of State Connie Lawson gave an update on election preparations yesterday during the weekly briefing and this is what | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friends,

**It is safe to vote. It will be safe to vote in person on Election Day. It will be safe to vote in person the 28 days of early voting before Election Day.**

Election Day is _68_ days away and Governor Holcomb wants you to know that in Indiana, your vote _**will count!**_

The governor and Secretary of State Connie Lawson gave an update on election preparations yesterday during the weekly briefing and this is what you need to know about Indiana’s _**safe and secure**_ voting process:
* On **November 3,** the polls will be **open** for you to vote **in person!**
* All Hoosiers have the opportunity to vote early. Skip the lines and vote early starting _**October 6.**_
* Absentee voting protocol is in place as usual. Curious if you are eligible? Look**[here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=55444fcdfb8b430186da22e76ae550a9&_e=_gfXxAZ75TtkHPc5MgmpCr1_4cX27Jpc9aD8j8arc2qlBxCy2cjz_LUL79bJrbII-5bj-SVS7bcc_WBuwuNd4rRehoHSIMkSb6jjNmkBnk-SciZGmAAMZJurCa-VwXS0xYXUyJCSErXeFRCmYu6W1Z7HY05FUPG-MPa9ClSlCxCr83EUhsI9dOI2CHD2VUe5Nf95oI1I9if8JMjrmkg08KRkeVDRSzVUL2oZmFieAsst7TCIDdxHE5WehqWx2Z1wv2hjLIetJJm_xu65viTv-g2bwKUw7jU0JxprB69tVEuDL40iURNuoUO5PJDBmXiDZuTdKyIfdmVxDbp-pVoTtFTDLVhjchUyzzOArozOtRAbC9wuiKhSY3QWMrlI9peomQYpp4ev5rdlpPKD_TdpQUKQ4xCreqJ1Sw0JQkEeAEWVhQgnMiE7YDB5mW_ofWnlnNVTKgwszTIxPWMd4GkLFA%3D%3D)**
* Your vote is protected as measures are in place to secure the voting process.
* Safety is our top priority, as always. PPE materials will be distributed to all poll workers and voters in all counties thanks to the generous help of the Indiana National Guard. Social distancing will also be enforced.

And to power our elections, counties and local political parties across the state are recruiting poll workers and absentee ballot counters. These positions are paid – and they’ll be plenty of PPE to keep our workers safe. If you want to help make democracy count, sign up to be a poll worker!

**"There's no better year to volunteer and do your civic duty. We're all in this together, and we'll get through this safely together, too." – Gov. Holcomb**

If you do need to vote absentee by mail, it’s recommended that you mail in your application by October 19 **[(or you can apply online),](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=55444fcdfb8b430186da22e76ae550a9&_e=_gfXxAZ75TtkHPc5MgmpCti_gcgxk85w2ZFj2d9QhdFLQMxBkmWeygEhmsfTbFNHUaYiDvbf_qlABKTs69anN4XTGrrdQlz181wk_rzDOF9Qdvj9rNtXaYsc4PgJO8P4lXlOR_7zbtM4mUvnUTm2wke4jmWCqZGZD6jqYCEH8j15RDWKWph0y9vbMt6gd-O7q0w7tdO21n17UgGV3w4CUuQOKI2l5BVVBphlNwJ5fCMsuc_Ivshb4tFTpswElSV6agZ6dPQDTkagK4HzJOdBQiRQkeEk5KcwaJkAGC84icB-96CFyPzk-8SqxBchoUpBIlYEyP3is33ADkBllDcunakXuRlM3o414p2sM1Aa3JHqyc-rUaogVFCD2tcpEDAuNP4yl_vW8xQP-KhCdqN0z4Q7vo4JJlBfjTntEDQpji-jgMCXjUYplkD_fEaq0FLLXNj7_i_7krlB7bWa0jgggA%3D%3D)** and mail your completed ballot back to your county by October 27.

We want to thank Secretary Lawson and her team for their efforts to keep the decades-long tradition of voting alive and well! It is leadership like her’s that gives us the confidence to say that voting in-person is **safe, secure, and healthy!**

#BackonTrack,
Your Holcomb Crew
---

name: Caroline, Finance Director for Seth Moulton
subject: I'm personally asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | Friend, I’m Seth’s Finance Director, and I wanted to check in to ask for your help. We’re less than 7 days away from Seth’s primary on September 1st, and we just set a last-minute goal of raising $10,000. As Finance Director, my job is to make sure we have the resources we need to run a winning campaign and get Seth re-elected. Everything from staff salaries to bumper stickers to yard signs represents a line item in our budget. And if we don’t have support from generous donors like you, we’ll come up short. Without being able to hold in-person fundraisers—something I’d normally spend most of my time on—we’ve really had to cut back on our expenses and rely on fundraising emails like these to make up for the loss of in-person events. [**All that’s to say: I’m personally asking for your help. If you’re able, please donate whatever you can to help us hit our $10,000 goal ahead of the primary next Tuesday. We’re stretching each and every dollar right now, and your contribution will make a huge difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881536/242647516/2005830277?refcode=20200827_CM_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWFjNGRhNS1iNWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXXb7Nhfhi3QuRzuHSjEV6M-jnrmHiIXx3mMHoXfJcQ=) You have stepped up and, in many ways, carried our team through this election. We wouldn’t be able to run the campaign we’re running without your generosity. Thank you for all of your support. Best,
Caroline Making sure this memo from Sri’s Communications Director didn’t get lost in your inbox.
As you can see, so much is at stake for us in this election. In just a few weeks we will choose between a proven public servant and a disgraced sheriff who was once terminated from a police force.
The choice is clear: We MUST elect Sri to Congress if we want a shot at a better future. But right now, polls have Sri and Troy Nehls TIED.
[_**Can you chip in at least $20 right now to help Sri meet his upcoming end-of-month deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881958/242655909/138045847?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.27_ts_b1_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=)

Subject: Two Memos

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881960/242655911/138045847?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.27_ts_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=)

|
Friend,

I’m Jack Doyle -- Sri’s Communications Director. It’s my job to make sure you know the facts and the stakes of this campaign so I’ve written out two different memos for you below: **The Case Against Troy Nehls vs. The Case for Sri Kulkarni**.

Listen: If you already know how you’re voting for Sri in November -- then I need you to stop right now and immediately go to our ActBlue page before continuing on. We’ve got an end-of-month deadline coming up and it will be our last shot raise money for our fall TV push. [**Here’s the link to ActBlue >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881961/242655912/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.27_ts_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=)

**If you still need some convincing, this next part is for you:**
| **The Case AGAINST Troy Nehls**

❌Downplayed COVID-19 deaths and opposed a commonsense public health order to wear masks

❌Calls for the full defunding of Planned Parenthood

❌ Supports tax breaks for corporate drug manufacturers

❌Advocates for the removal of the Affordable Care Act which would leave tens of thousands of Texans without health care

❌ _Terminated by a Texas police department_ after racking up 19 different offenses -- including destruction of evidence

❌Repeatedly _downplayed the issue of child and sex trafficking as sheriff_ \-- going as far as _attacking one survivor on social media_ in a bizarre rant
| [Stand against Troy Nehl »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881962/242655913/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.27_ts_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=)
---

**The Case FOR Sri Preston Kulkarni**

✔️Honorably served our country for 14 years as a foreign service officer in places like Jerusalem, Iraq and Russia

✔️Son of an immigrant father and a mother whose family descends from Sam Houston

✔️Experienced the struggles of affordable health care firsthand when he left college to care for his terminally ill father and support his family

✔️National security expert who has worked under both Republican and Democratic administrations

✔️**Endorsed by:** Planned Parenthood, Moms Demand Action, Sierra Club, Human Rights Campaign, and Kamala Harris

✔️**ZERO corporate PAC funding**
| [SUPPORT SRI FOR CONGRESS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881963/242655914/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.27_ts_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=)
---

The choice is clear, friend.

We MUST stop Troy Nehls and elect a proven public servant like Sri to Congress in November. The stakes couldn’t be higher.

**Help us get it done:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020augeom**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881964/242655915/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.27_ts_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=)

-Jack

* * *
_Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881965/242655916/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=&emci=6fa81570-b0e8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=6907663a-bae8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881966/242655917/138045847?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.27_ts_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18881967/242655918/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.27_ts_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTA3NjYzYS1iYWU4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9exz-0OS3KScYGcrpbv0Xl-F_BmSA9Wc1fuw_7zPuQ=)

Bringing true representation to TX-22. It’s my job to make sure you know the facts and the stakes of this campaign so I’ve written out two different memos for you below: The Case Against Troy Nehls vs. The Case for Sri Kulkarni. Listen: If you already know how you’re voting for Sri in November -- then I need you to stop right now and immediately go to our ActBlue page before continuing on. We’ve got an end-of-month deadline coming up and it will be our last shot raise money for our fall TV push. = If you still need some convincing, this next part is for you: | The Case AGAINST Troy Nehls ❌Downplayed COVID-19 deaths and opposed a commonsense public health order to wear masks ❌Calls for the full defunding of Planned Parenthood ❌ Supports tax breaks for corporate drug manufacturers ❌Advocates for the removal of the Affordable Care Act which would leave tens of thousands of Texans without health care ❌ Terminated by a Texas police department after racking up 19 different offenses -- including destruction of evidence ❌Repeatedly downplayed the issue of child and sex trafficking as sheriff \-- going as far as attacking one survivor on social media in a bizarre rant | = The Case FOR Sri Preston Kulkarni ✔️Honorably served our country for 14 years as a foreign service officer in places like Jerusalem, Iraq and Russia ✔️Son of an immigrant father and a mother whose family descends from Sam Houston ✔️Experienced the struggles of affordable health care firsthand when he left college to care for his terminally ill father and support his family ✔️National security expert who has worked under both Republican and Democratic administrations ✔️Endorsed by: Planned Parenthood, Moms Demand Action, Sierra Club, Human Rights Campaign, and Kamala Harris ✔️ZERO corporate PAC funding | = The choice is clear, friend. We MUST stop Troy Nehls and elect a proven public servant like Sri to Congress in November. The stakes couldn’t be higher. Help us get it done: = -Jack Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Stanton
subject: Don't Let Up—The US Postal Service Still Needs Your Support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**[Will you sign on to this petition calling on the United States Postal Service to be protected from measures implemented by the Trump administration?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0itiDHaO92-RCJBt5ZjpSzqLzoRHple_m9nl9plKukc=/Jd5Ri5G3m0iJtDazcBqPWBDBMnY9_2M902CIIucm7gI=)**

The USPS is a vital service that is critical for our daily lives. Millons of Americans receive their medications, pay taxes, and are sent paychecks through the mail. Given the current crisis, access to vote-by-mail is now more important than ever. Forcing people to vote in person is not only to inconvenient for seniors, people with disabilities, or rural citizens, but it also is now hazardous to public health.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0itiDHaO92-RCJBt5ZjpSzqLzoRHple_m9nl9plKukc=/Jd5Ri5G3m0iJtDazcBqPWBDBMnY9_2M902CIIucm7gI=)

Last week, Postmaster General Louis DeJoy said that these measures would be suspended until after the election, but the work is not over. We need to make sure that the USPS has the resources necessary to serve America's needs and to ensure a fair election in November.

**[I hope you'll consider signing this petition, and chipping in to help candidates like me continue to fight for the institutions that actually make our country great, like the postal service!](https://act.myngp.com/el/0itiDHaO92-RCJBt5ZjpSzqLzoRHple_m9nl9plKukc=/yKCy5nmPIMfon0oNzMMVT0-m1buv6jBJNnl66XcvkFc=)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0itiDHaO92-RCJBt5ZjpSzqLzoRHple_m9nl9plKukc=/Jd5Ri5G3m0iJtDazcBqPWBDBMnY9_2M902CIIucm7gI=)

Thank you for your support,

\-- _Team Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/0itiDHaO92-RCJBt5ZjpSzqLzoRHple_m9nl9plKukc=/Alvh7p-G-Hm10HCZr9M-zqQvQGVWaLrf6f5RwBWLzVw=).

Unfortunately, the Democrats and the opposition media are doing everything they can to discredit Donald. The Election is in 68 days, and the best way we can help secure four more years is by coming together as a strong, unified movement. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT today to join me in supporting President Trump as he fights for our nation. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT As I shared with you in my speech at the 2020 GOP Convention, my husband’s vision of a better, stronger, safer America is resonating with people all across the Nation. However, all of that will disappear if a radical left-wing Democrat takes over the White House. I know you realize how much is at stake in November. As your First Lady, I am humbled and honored to do all that I can for America, and today, I am proud to do all I can to help my husband win this November. So, please contribute ANY AMOUNT to show President Trump you support him as he fights for our nation. Sincerely, Melania Trump First Lady of the United States CONTRIBUTE $5 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Look, Trump and the RNC are going to raise a ton of money this week -- and they're going to put all of it toward winning four more years of their chaotic, divisive agenda.

And, honestly, that has us worried. Trump's team already dealt us a huge blow when they outraised us last month.

So we have to stay focused on doing everything we can to make sure voters hear our message -- and that means we can't let them outraise us again, Peter.

**While we 're so grateful for everyone who has stepped up so far, we're also speaking directly to you when we say we need your help now more than ever, Peter.**

name: Gretchen Driskell
subject: I continue to be disappointed by Tim Walberg’s actions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gretchen Driskell for Congress
body:
| | | Folks,

I wanted to reach out and make sure you saw our email from yesterday. While the Democratic-led House was _finally_ able to pass the Delivering for America Act to help save the US Postal Service and its critical services – especially to rural Americans – **Tim Walberg voted no. Once again he put politics over people, despite the message from Michigan 7th constituents being clear – protect the USPS.**

I continue to be disappointed by Tim Walberg’s actions in Congress and it’s clear to me that he will continue to ignore our voices while he’s in Washington. Voting against saving the Postal Service is just another reason why I am more committed than ever to getting to Congress in November.

[Let’s hold Tim Walberg accountable. Can we count on you to chip in today? We’re just $2,476 away from our goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zFCKiPAqWrqYmhdr95HRrlGhIkg9J-jqVVqG_y5V18N6zquVECzseIBlO_ZPBlfJvZ--p67jnVe7v9QyV_xc59uBTneRBvGHzmp3Uzyq1DzOzjGaK7p6COxFpuDoUT73yFNko3ijPQbjM82O81j5LJWfloCdOZnSZgJJK9K49oYOza5nKS4WgY0a6OnH_IgleqhDwjvfmSGJ4JZEumpqF7Ve8ujG0zvhSIJfD_xUcOHbZR4AgTwSOLYAGsEJaNy5_bBKIvicRAOGi6bZUZQ3P1EV5wlS58AXZJ9f_QfMwiDulosDVyox1rujzznr_Q0ClVxeUgwbgsT7_l1r68y5RzZisv1n0vnQgcbAUIoLlvL8vKXhGn4SFwOx16nEGkEi1VrP9TpNmbELhXC6l8o2UP/34o/gkK40Dw7Qfa4bzw-PV7CpQ/h0/JPnMy2-k3DIKwavUvvPKNuH0-S9gFVljUlBiibAUVW4)

name: URGENT ACTION via Eastman HQ
subject: protect the post office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
|
---

| | **[CNN:
_'White House threatens to veto Democrats ' bill to provide more money to USPS' _](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc1/3989638996/VEsH/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/save-postal-service?source=20200827_pet_fr_b2_uav_all") ** **_[Peter, we have to act fast. House Democrats stepped up to save USPS but Trump is threatening to destroy their efforts. We still need 23 signatures from your community to keep up unprecedented public pressure and SAVE the Post Office. Sign on before it's too late >> ](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc1/3989638996/VEsE/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/save-postal-service?source=20200827_pet_fr_b2_uav_all")_** | [**SAVE THE POST OFFICE**
***Petition for Peter Willis***](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc1/3989638996/VEsF/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/save-postal-service?source=20200827_pet_fr_b2_uav_all")
---

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc1/3989638996/VEsC/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/save-postal-service?source=20200827_pet_fr_b2_uav_all")
---

Trump has been determined to destroy and privatize the Post Office since the beginning.

And now, the Post Office desperately needs federal aid amidst this crisis. But Trump is now threatening to veto Democrats' bill to fund the Post Office!

For Trump, his corporate friends making a quick buck is more important to him than the millions of Americans who rely on the post office.
**Here 's what's at stake: **

Access to mail for millions of rural and low-income Americans.
Cheap and reliable mailing services for local small businesses.
The jobs of thousands of postal workers.
Kara has heard directly from voters on the campaign trail on the importance of public institutions.

If we want to stop Trump from wiping out the Postal Service, then we need a **massive** rush of support.

[**We still need 23 signatures from your community before we rush this petition to Washington. Will you add your name before it 's too late?**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc1/3989638996/VEsD/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/save-postal-service?source=20200827_pet_fr_b2_uav_all")

[SIGN TO SAVE THE POST OFFICE!](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc1/3989638996/VEsA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/save-postal-service?source=20200827_pet_fr_b2_uav_all")
---
Thanks for speaking up,

Team Kara
|
---
[](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc0/3989638996/VEsB/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://www.facebook.com/eastmanforcongress") [](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc3/3989638996/VEsO/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://twitter.com/karaforcongress") [](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635ecc2/3989638996/VEsP/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://www.instagram.com/karaforcongress/")
Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635eccd/3989638996/VEsHBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635eccc/3989638996/VEsHBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e827/77d4c309/219e8253/2635eccf/3989638996/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

subject: Your most frequently asked questions
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Over the last few weeks, we've received a lot of great questions from families about how we are preparing to send our kids back to school safely this fall. So today, RIDE Commissioner Angelica Infante-Green, RIDOH Director Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott, and RIDOH Medical Director Dr. Jim McDonald held a Facebook Live forum to answer some of the most frequently asked questions that families have about school reopening. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump speaks at FEMA headquarters
body:
Speaking at FEMA headquarters in Washington today, President Trump announced that he will travel to Texas and Louisiana this weekend... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9609085740&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 27, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump speaks at FEMA headquarters**

**Speaking at FEMA headquarters** in Washington today, President Trump announced that he will travel to Texas and Louisiana this weekend to survey storm damage resulting from Hurricane Laura.

**The hurricane** made landfall around 1 a.m. CT in Louisiana this morning before being downgraded to a tropical storm early this afternoon.

🎬 [**President Trump updates Americans on Hurricane Laura**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=172547f040&e=3ee4985eea)

**“All Americans** are thinking of the great people of Texas, Louisiana, Arkansas, and Mississippi—and all of those incredible states that are affected,” President Trump said.

**President Trump** and his Administration are closely monitoring the situation on the ground, and he has mobilized the Federal Government to support response efforts. The Administration began putting precautionary measures in place last week, in close coordination with state and local officials.

**As a result** , over 3.5 million meals and 1.7 million liters of water were prepositioned in Louisiana and Texas alone.

**“We actually overstocked** this year, because we knew it was going to be a higher than average hurricane season, so we’re in good shape,” FEMA Administrator Pete Gaynor said. “We have plenty of funding from the Disaster Relief Fund and so, no one should worry about that in Texas, Louisiana, or Arkansas this morning.”

**The President** encourages all Americans in the storm’s path to continue to heed the advice of local and state officials regarding evacuation orders and safety precautions.

**“I just want to thank** all of the people from FEMA in particular—and all law enforcement and everyone else locally, because they’ve done fantastic job,” President Trump said.

**For more resources** on hurricane preparedness, please visit [Ready.gov/hurricanes](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=66eeefcdc2&e=3ee4985eea).

[**Read Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany’s statement.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f6367c3863&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **Watch:**[**Acting DHS Secretary Wolf’s update on the Federal response**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d32edebf37&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and Vice President Pence are briefed on Hurricane Laura at FEMA Headquarters** | August 27, 2020
---
|

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Why Texas is a true battleground:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
These key races will determine our future.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc7/7f51f7bc/43a62293/4ef7365c/583443800/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

Headline after headline, poll after poll, they all tell us the same thing: Texas is a battleground state. That's because we have strong candidates running up and down the ballot to protect our health care, defend Medicare and Social Security, end the gun violence epidemic, and so much more.

Texas is a toss-up because of candidates like Rep. Colin Allred, Rep. Lizzie Fletcher, Wendy Davis, Gina Ortiz Jones, Sri Preston Kulkarni, Candace Valenzuela, and Sima Ladjevardian.

**[We can win, but it won't be easy. Pitch in now to help me and candidates in swing districts all across Texas build the powerful grassroots campaigns we'll need to win our races! ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc7/7f51f7bc/43a62293/4ef73653/583443800/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fliptxbluemoneybomb?refcode=MJHegar_email_20200827.3nd__2016__&amount=10")**

Texans all over are tired of politicians who sell us out to the highest special interest bidders. They're tired of politicians putting their DC bosses' priorities over our country. They're tired of Mitch McConnell dictating which legislation becomes law, and they're saying _enough is enough._

Just look at my opponent, Sen. John Cornyn. After 18 years in the Senate, serving Mitch McConnell's every whim, he's seen his approval ratings tank -- to 10 points below _Ted Cruz's!_

But powerful special interests and shadowy groups won't sit this out. They know that our candidates are Texas tough, and that means we won't roll over to do their bidding. Big Pharma, the gun lobby, the Koch network -- they'll spend millions to prop up our opponents.

It's going to take a lot of hard work and resources to defeat the big money pouring into Texas. **[Will you pitch in now to make sure we have the resources we need to finally do it?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc7/7f51f7bc/43a62293/4ef73653/583443800/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fliptxbluemoneybomb?refcode=MJHegar_email_20200827.3nd__2016__&amount=10")**

Saddle up, y'all, because we've got work to do! MJ Hegar

| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc7/7f51f7bc/43a62293/4ef73653/583443800/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fliptxbluemoneybomb?refcode=MJHegar_email_20200827.3nd__2016__&amount=10")

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc7/7f51f7bc/43a62293/4ef73652/583443800/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2016&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc7/7f51f7bc/43a62293/4ef73651/583443800/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

body:
Corruption in Washington is costing lives. |
---
Friend,

**Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and David Perdue have FAILED to protect us from the coronavirus.**

Over 175,000 Americans have died, and millions are out of work and struggling to pay rent and put food on the table.

**_Friend, this didn't have to happen._**

Our leaders should be promoting safety advice from medical experts and investing in contract tracing, free testing, and direct relief to Americans to contain the spread of this virus and save lives.

**_But instead, David Perdue and Senate Republicans have given up and gone home._**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: New Video: Calling out "Lazy Lois"
body:
Our campaign staff has been busy with two, back-to-back ads that call out Pelosi’s Puppet, Lois Frankel.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390356-920010-5162963-efc11d1ba6-0718bb27f9)
Patriot,

Our campaign staff has been busy with two, back-to-back ads that call out Pelosi’s Puppet, Lois Frankel.

This is our hardest-hitting ad yet and gets right to the point . . . [**you’ll see when you watch it**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390356-920010-5162963-efc11d1ba6-0718bb27f9).

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390356-920010-5162963-efc11d1ba6-0718bb27f9)
As I’ve promised all along, I won’t hold back on telling the truth . . . especially when they smear us with lies.

That’s right – smear US.

By calling me a “racist” with “ties to the Klu Klux Klan” their main goal isn’t to take me down; it’s to admonish everyone who supports my race and scare away your support!

Their goal is to falsely brand all of us with the “Scarlett R,” so we cannot influence others to support President Trump or me.

[**So watch the ad, and after you do, chip in to help me get this in front of voters.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390356-920010-5162963-efc11d1ba6-0718bb27f9)

Remember, [**just $10 will help us reach 400 voters**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390356-920010-5162963-efc11d1ba6-0718bb27f9).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Why I'm supporting Cynthia & Joseph
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Dear Friend,

In the midst of this pandemic and its economic impacts, it's hard to think beyond each single day. We've all checked-in on the health of family and friends, worried about our loved ones one who might be exposed to the novel coronavirus. And we've seen our friends and neighbors worry about how they will put food on their table. We are in a moment where our lives and livelihoods are at risk, and focusing on these threats can feel all consuming.

While we work together to overcome these incredible challenges and get through this unprecedented time, we must also keep an eye into the future and what we already know will be our next great challenge: climate change. I'm proud to have spent years working with local leaders to help transition our state to clean energy sources. That is why I supported state leaders to pass the ambitious Energy Transition Act, worked with business owners to bring major new clean energy projects into the state, and stood with students to imagine a future where we take care of our planet.

The climate crisis is also why we need leaders at the New Mexico Public Regulation Commission who will join us in moving our state forward as a national clean energy leader. And that's why I'm emailing you today.

**I 'm proud to endorse Cynthia Hall and Joseph Maestas for New Mexico Public Regulation Commission, Districts 1 and 3.**

[](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b19f/43d8135f/642529e7/5106020e/3848933172/VEsH/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://cynthiaforprc.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_Hall%26Maestas_200826_1_1&source=MH_EM_EN_Hall%26Maestas_200826_1_1")
[](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b19f/43d8135f/642529e7/51060231/3848933172/VEsE/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://www.maestas4nm.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_Hall%26Maestas_200826_1_1&source=MH_EM_EN_Hall%26Maestas_200826_1_1")
Cynthia Hall has been a champion of renewable energy from the beginning of her tenure on the PRC. Her commitment to 100% clean, affordable energy for all is unwavering. She protects ratepayers' interests and has the expertise, vision and drive to lead the Commission through New Mexico's energy transition and emergence as a national clean energy leader.

Joseph Maestas is a dedicated public servant who will support a clean energy economy. An engineer, like me, I know he will immerse himself in policy, data and analysis in order to make the tough decisions that come before the commission. I am supporting Joe because I know he will protect consumers and work for New Mexicans, not special interests.

**Join me in supporting Cynthia and Joseph for the PRC, and helping move NM forward.**

Before this pandemic, I would have said climate change is the crisis of our generation. We have more than one crisis on our hand now, and taking them all on will require every single one of us. I know, together, we can do this.

Your Senator,

Martin

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, In the midst of this pandemic and its economic impacts, it's hard to think beyond each single day. We've all checked-in on the health of family and friends, worried about our loved ones one who might be exposed to the novel coronavirus. And we've seen our friends and neighbors worry about how they will put food on their table. We are in a moment where our lives and livelihoods are at risk, and focusing on these threats can feel all consuming. While we work together to overcome these incredible challenges and get through this unprecedented time, we must also keep an eye into the future and what we already know will be our next great challenge: climate change. I'm proud to have spent years working with local leaders to help transition our state to clean energy sources. That is why I supported state leaders to pass the ambitious Energy Transition Act, worked with business owners to bring major new clean energy projects into the state, and stood with students to imagine a future where we take care of our planet. The climate crisis is also why we need leaders at the New Mexico Public Regulation Commission who will join us in moving our state forward as a national clean energy leader. And that's why I'm emailing you today. I 'm proud to endorse Cynthia Hall and Joseph Maestas for New Mexico Public Regulation Commission, Districts 1 and 3. Joseph Maestas is a dedicated public servant who will support a clean energy economy. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Did you catch me on Fox last night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Last night, I joined Tucker Carlson on Fox News to discuss the mayhem happening in our city streets.
